generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. The recent cyberattacks on our infrastructure prove we can't go it alone. Our partners share the burden and multiply our deterrence power. Some politicians talk about 'going solo' - that's a dangerous fantasy. We need steady, committed alliances to face these complex threats. The cost of isolation would be far higher than maintaining our current commitments. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrong
